description: Fix missing values (N/A), extra spaces, and capitalization
Fix email, punctuation, spaces, and missing value
input: contact: bob@@mail..com ,,  phone: N/A ,,  city: new york
expected_output: contact: bob@mail.com, phone: unknown, city: new york

description: Replace nulls, fix spacing, fix punctuation
expected_output: product: unknown, price: unknown, status: available

description: Fix multiple errors: missing values, email, and duplicate punctuation
input: user: N/A ,,  email: test@@domain..com ,,  score: NULL
expected_output: user: unknown, email: test@domain.com, score: unknown

description: Clean dataset row with all types of errors
input: id: 101 ,  name: N/A ,  email: hr@@corp..net ,,  dept: NULL
expected_output: id: 101, name: unknown, email: hr@corp.net, dept: unknown
